hero.subtitle: Find trusted local sitters who treat your pet like family. Request a booking in minutes and track status from your dashboard.
hero.bookingNote: This is just an example — real totals depend on sitter rate and dates.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: A clean MVP experience focused on browsing, requesting, and managing bookings.
features.simpleDesc: Clear daily rates, easy date selection, and upfront totals — no surprises.
features.trustedDesc: Sitters share experience, services, and a bio so you can book confidently.
features.requestDesc: Send a request and get a clear ACCEPTED / REJECTED response in your dashboard.

steps.title: Three easy steps
steps.step1Desc: Search profiles by city and price. Read bios and pick the sitter that feels right for your pet.
steps.step2Desc: Choose your dates and send a request. Your sitter reviews and responds.
steps.step3Desc: Once accepted, you're all set. Your pet gets loving care while you're away.

cta.title: Ready to meet your pet's new best friend?
cta.subtitle: Browse sitters, send a booking request, and manage everything from your dashboard.

dashboard.title: Owner Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Pets and bookings in one place.

profile.title: Edit profile
profile.subtitle: Add or update your profile photo and personal details.
